problem id: 47720c17
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10011111 -> 11100111
  10110001 -> 10101100
  01001000 -> 01111011
  01101000 -> 01111011
  10000111 -> 01100111
  01010001 -> 10111110
  10010111 -> 01100111
  00101010 -> 11011111

query: 00011011
predicted answer: 10001110
